steps.requiredChange: Add max retry limit to prevent infinite loops
steps.evidenceRequired: Tests show retry stops, but duplicate payments occur
steps.blockReason: BLOCK: Idempotency missing - duplicate charges possible

steps.requiredChange: Implement payment idempotency key validation and duplicate detection
steps.evidenceRequired: Duplicate charges prevented, but unauthorized refunds possible
steps.unresolved: Refund authority missing - anyone can trigger refunds
steps.blockReason: BLOCK: Refund authority missing - unauthorized refunds possible

steps.requiredChange: Implement authority check before refund processing based on amount
steps.evidenceRequired: Refunds require authority, but webhook can still inject tool instructions
steps.blockReason: BLOCK: Webhook instruction isolation missing - prompt injection possible

steps.requiredChange: Implement webhook content sanitization to prevent instruction injection
steps.evidenceRequired: Webhooks sanitized, but deployed state not verified
steps.unresolved: Deploy gate does not verify post-state
steps.blockReason: BLOCK: Deploy post-state verification missing - deployed state unverified

steps.description: ADMISSIBLE: Deploy gate verifies final state and receipt binds
steps.requiredChange: Implement post-deploy state verification and receipt final state binding
steps.evidenceRequired: All admissibility rules satisfied - payment mutation safe, refund authority bound, webhook sanitized, deploy verified, receipt trustworthy

haltCondition: When haltReason: ADMISSIBLE and ratchetLoopDepth >= 5, all admissibility rules are satisfied and the system is safe from the multi-vector attack
